## LinkedIn (Long-form)

### Announcement Post

**Standards-aligned AI tools for Missouri educators**

I'm excited to share Access To Education — a free, open-source AI tool for educators, curriculum directors, and instructional coaches.

Here's the problem: Standards alignment, lesson planning, teacher growth for Missouri K-12. But navigating this space is complex, and most people don't have a specialist by their side.

Access To Education changes that. It's a Claude Skill — upload one file to Claude, and it becomes your education expert. No code, no cost.

What you can do:
1. Align a lesson plan to Missouri Learning Standards with differentiation
2. Generate a professional growth plan tied to student outcomes
3. Design a cross-curricular unit connecting ELA and social studies

It's part of the Access To ecosystem — 6 pillars, 7 projects, all open source.

Try it: github.com/dougdevitre/access-to-education
Learn more: https://dougdevitre.org

#AccessTo #CivicTech #AI #OpenSource #Education
